title: Wooden Accents Mod
description: Decorate your world with new wooden furniture and other functional decorations!
body: # Wooden Accents Mod This mod adds beautiful wooden furniture and other decorations that are perfect for anyone who loves building and decorating with wood! ## Blocks Added * Chairs * Tables * Coffee Tables - Can be made taller (like a slab) * The taller version can be picked up using the silk touch enchantment * Stripped Wood Ladders - 3d ladders that connect! * Plank Ladders - A couple of wooden planks nailed to a wall that can be climbed * Crates - They're like shulker boxes but made of wood! They even stack! * Plank Carpets * Plank Walls * Desks * Desk Drawers * Kitchen Counters * Kitchen Cabinets * Modern Fences * Modern Fence Gates * Supports - Small cubes that connect omnidirectionally to each other, and to some other block * Visually similar to pipes in most mods, but Wooden and featureless! * Thin Pillars - Thin blocks with a wider base and top part which connect vertically together * Thick Pillars - Like thin pillars, but thick! * Thin Bookshelves - Thin blocks that function the same as chiseled bookshelves * Requires experimental features enabled * Any bugs with them are likely just bugs with the chiseled bookshelf > There is a variant of each block for each wood type in the game, > including the ones locked behind experimental features > (experimental features must be enabled to use them). ## Dependencies ### Required * Fabric * Fabric Language Kotlin - Adds compatibility for the programming language this mod is written in * VoxLib - A library created by me which provides some useful tools for the code ### Recommended * [Easy Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-shulker-boxes) or [Shulker Box Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - Crates should be fully compatible with both mods just like shulker boxes. * Just Enough Items or Roughly Enough Items - recommended to help with recipes ## Additional Links * Curse Forge
